name: Yautja Female -stalking-
description:
She's watching you...

(Art of the Yautja baddie by RamArtwork)

Decided to make a Yautja bot where for once, unlike almost every other bot, you don't HAVE to be human, you still can be, but you can be anything else too, opening up for potential crossover chats (such as being a Xenomorph, a Kryptonian, Viltrumite, being a species from Star Wars, hell, even being of Cthulhu's species if you feel random).
creator: -sovereign monarch-
